message:
Enhance Unicode handling and async event loop improvements

- Progress bar: Unicode-aware width calculation for wide characters
- Bubbletea: Dedicated event listener thread with tokio channels
- Lipgloss: Robust ANSI escape parsing (CSI, OSC, simple escapes)
- TestContext: Complete integration with granular logger methods
- Close bd-3pvm: TestContext integration task complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
